name: Artzy Tyrannical
description: After the wielder scores a critical hit with a battle skill or combo skill, the wielder gains Cryo DMG% 22.4% for 30 s. Max stacks for effects of the same name: 3. Duration of each stack is counted separately. Effect only triggers once every 0.1s.

name: Chivalric Virtues
description: After the wielder's skill provides HP treatment, the entire team gains ATK% 14.4% for 15 s. Effects of the same name cannot stack.

name: Clannibal
description: After the wielder consumes an Arts Reaction, target enemy suffers Arts DMG Taken% 16.% (for the specified element) for 15 s. Each effect applies separately and does not stack with itself. Effect only triggers once every 25 s.

name: Delivery Guaranteed
description: After the wielder's combo skill applies Lifted, the team gains Arts DMG% 19.2% for 15 s. For every enemy Lifted, the team gains bonus Arts DMG% 5.6% , up to a max of 3 stacks. Effects of the same name cannot stack.

name: Detonation Unit
description: When the wielder applies an Arts Burst, target enemy suffers Arts DMG Taken% + 14.4% for 15 s. Effects of the same name cannot stack.

name: Dreams of the Starry Beach
description: After the wielder consumes Corrosion, target enemy suffers Arts DMG Taken% 16.% for 25 s. Effects of the same name cannot stack.

name: Eminent Repute
description: After the wielder consumes Vulnerability stack(s), the wielder gains ATK [ 8.%  + 4.% ×Stacks Consumed] while other operators in the team gain half of this buff for  20 s. Effects of the same name cannot stack.

name: Exemplar
description: When the wielder's battle skill or ultimate hits the enemy, the wielder gains Physical DMG% for 30 s. Max stacks for effects of the same name: 3. Duration of each stack is counted separately. Effect only triggers once every 0.1s.

name: Forgeborn Scathe
description: When the wielder casts an ultimate, the wielder gains Basic Attack DMG% 120.00% for 20 s. Effects of the same name cannot stack.

name: Former Finery
description: After a Protected operator takes DMG, the wielder restores the said operator's HP by [ 134.4  + Will× 112.00% ]. Effect only triggers once every 15 s.

name: Grand Vision
description: When the wielder applies Originium Seal or Solidification, during the next battle skill or ultimate cast within 20 s, the wielder gains Physical DMG% 57.6% . Effects of the same name cannot stack.

name: JET
description: When the wielder casts a battle skill, the wielder gains Arts DMG% 19.2% for 15 s. When the wielder casts a combo skill, Arts DMG% 19.2% for 15 s. The two effects apply separately and do not stack with themselves.

name: Khravengger
description: When the wielder's battle skill applies Cryo Infliction, the wielder gains Cryo DMG% 16.% for 15 s. When the wielder deals combo skill DMG to an enemy with Cryo Infliction, the wielder gains Cryo DMG% 32.% for 15 s. The two effects apply separately and do not stack with themselves.

name: Mountain Bearer
description: Against Vulnerable enemies, the wielder gains DMG% 32.% . When the wielder's battle skill applies Vulnerability, the wielder gains All Attributes 12.8% for 15 s. When the wielder's battle skill applies Physical Susceptibility, the wielder gains All Attributes 12.8% for 15 s. The two effects apply separately and do not stack with themselves.

name: Navigator
description: When Solidification or Corrosion is applied to enemies, the wielder gains Cryo DMG% and Nature DMG% 5.6% and Critical Rate% 3.2% for 15 s. If this effect is triggered by the wielder, double the increase gained. Effects of the same name cannot stack.

name: Never Rest
description: After the wielder's skill recovers SP, the wielder gains Physical DMG% 8.% while other operators in the team gain Physical DMG% 4.% for 30s. Max stacks for effects of the same name: Max 5. Duration of each stack is counted separately. Effect only triggers once every 0.1s.

name: Oblivion
description: When the wielder casts an ultimate, the wielder gains Arts DMG% 38.4% for 15 s. When the wielder casts a combo skill, the wielder gains Arts DMG% 19.2% for 15 s. The two effects apply separately and do not stack with themselves.

name: Opus: Etch Figure
description: When the wielder's battle skill applies Nature Infliction, other operators in the team gain Arts DMG% 8.% for 15 s. For every enemy suffering from Nature Infliction applied by the said battle skill, other operators in the team gain bonus Arts DMG% 3.2% , up to a max of 3 stacks. Effects of the same name cannot stack.

name: Rapid Ascent
description: Battle skills and ultimates gain Physical DMG% 24.% Against Staggered enemies, battle skills and ultimates also gain DMG% 56.%

name: Sundered Prince
description: When the wielder performs a Final Strike on the enemy, the wielder gains ATK% 16.% for 8 s. If the wielder is also the controlled operator, double the ATK increase gained and buff the Final Strike so that it deals bonus Stagger% 19.2% to the enemy. Effects of the same name cannot stack.

name: Thermite Cutter
description: After the wielder's skill recovers SP or grants a Link state, the entire team gains ATK% 8.% for 20 s. Max stacks for effects of the same name: Max Stack 2. Duration of each stack is counted separately.

name: Thunderberge
description: After the wielder's combo skill provides HP treatment, the controlled operator gains an additional [ 11.2% ×Wielder's Max HP] Shield for 15 s. Effect only triggers once every 15s.

name: Umbral Torch
description: Whenever Combustion or Corrosion is applied to an enemy, the wielder gains Heat and Nature DMG% 12.8% for 20 s. Max stacks for effects of the same name: 2. Duration of each stack is counted separately. Effect only triggers once every 0.1s.

name: Valiant
description: After the wielder applies Physical Statuses, the wielder also deals another hit of Physical DMG equal to 192.00% of the wielder's ATK.

name: Wedge
description: When the wielder casts a battle skill, the wielder gains Arts DMG% 12.8% for 15 s. When the wielder's battle skill applies an Arts Reaction, the wielder gains Arts DMG% 25.6% for 15 s. The two effects apply separately and do not stack with themselves.

name: White Night Nova
description: After the wielder applies Combustion or Electrification, the wielder gains Arts DMG% 19.2% and Arts Intensity 40 for 15 s. Effects of the same name cannot stack.

name: Ancient Canal
description: After the wielder consumes Vulnerability stack(s), the wielder gains Physical DMG% +[ 8.% ×Stacks Consumed] for 20 s. Effects of the same name cannot stack.

name: Aspirant
description: After the wielder applies Lifted, during the next ultimate cast within 30 s, the wielder gains Physical DMG% 19.2% . Max stacks for effects of the same name:  3. Duration of each stack is counted separately. Effect only triggers once every 0.5s.

name: Chimeric Justice
description: When the wielder applies Vulnerability to an enemy with no Vulnerability stacks, the wielder gains ATK% 24.% for  15 s. Effects of the same name cannot stack.

name: Cohesive Traction
description: When the wielder casts a combo skill, during the next battle skill cast within 30 s, the wielder gains Electric DMG% 16.% . Max stacks for effects of the same name: 3. Duration of each stack is counted separately.

name: Finchaser 3.0
description: ATK% 12.8% When the wielder's battle skill applies Solidification, target enemy suffers Cryo DMG Taken for 15 s. Effects of the same name cannot stack.
